<svg width="400" height="300" viewBox="0 0 400 300">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Bicycle Frame -->
  <g transform="translate(200,50)">
    <!-- Wheel -->
    <circle cx="-60" cy="0" r="80" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    
    <!-- Handlebars -->
    <path d="M-70 -20 Q-90 -40 -100 -20 L-100 20 Q-90 40 -70 20 Z" 
          stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    
    <!-- Seat -->
    <ellipse rx="20" ry="10" cx="-50" cy="100" fill="#ffcc00"/>
    
    <!-- Chainring -->
    <circle cx="-30" cy="120" r="10" fill="#fff"/>
    
    <!-- Pedals -->
    <circle cx="-30" cy="140" r="10" fill="#fff"/>
    <circle cx="-30" cy="160" r="10" fill="#fff"/>
    
    <!-- Wheels -->
    <circle cx="-60" cy="0" r="80" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <circle cx="-60" cy="0" r="80" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="300" viewBox="0 0 400 300">
    <!-- Background -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f0f0f0"/>
    
    <!-- Table -->
    <g transform="translate(250,180)">
        <!-- Top edge -->
        <line x1="-10" y1="0" x2="10" y2="0" stroke-width="2" stroke="#6b798c"/>
        
        <!-- Bottom edge -->
        <line x1="-10" y1="0" x2="10" y2="0" stroke-width="2" stroke="#6b798c"/>
        
        <!-- Left edge -->
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="10" stroke-width="2" stroke="#6b798c"/>
        
        <!-- Right edge -->
        <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="0" y2="10" stroke-width="2" stroke="#6b798c"/>
        
        <!-- Fruit (Banana) -->
        <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="15" fill="#ffac33"/>
        
        <!-- Fruit (Orange) -->
        <circle cx="100" cy="50" r="15" fill="#e6a12d"/>
        
        <!-- Fruit (Apple) -->
        <circle cx="150" cy="50" r="15" fill="#cc4c00"/>
        
        <!-- Fruit (Pear) -->
        <circle cx="200" cy="50" r="15" fill="#9b5ab2"/>
        
        <!-- Fruit (Strawberry) -->
        <circle cx="250" cy="50" r="15" fill="#daedfc"/>
        
        <!-- Stem -->
        <path d="M150,50 Q170,70 150,90 T150,50" fill="#231f20"/>
        
        <!-- Leaves -->
        <polygon points="120,50 140,70 120,90" fill="#231f20"/>
        <polygon points="180,50 200,70 180,90" fill="#231f20"/>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Woman's silhouette -->
    <g transform="translate(250,180)" opacity=".8">
        <!-- Head -->
        <ellipse rx="30" ry="20" cx="200" cy="100" fill="#ffffff"/>
        
        <!-- Body -->
        <ellipse rx="40" ry="30" cx="200" cy="150" fill="#ffffff"/>
        
        <!-- Arms -->
        <path d="M180,150 L220,150" stroke="#6b798c" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M180,150 L220,150" stroke="#6b798c" stroke-width="2"/>
        
        <!-- Legs -->
        <path d="M180,150 L220,150" stroke="#6b798c" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M180,150 L220,150" stroke="#6b798c" stroke-width="2"/>
        
        <!-- Feet -->
        <circle cx="180" cy="150" r="5" fill="#6b798c"/>
        <circle cx="220" cy="150" r="5" fill="#6b798c"/>
    </g>
</svg>

<svg width="400" height="400" viewBox="-25 -18 60 36">
    <!-- Black Background -->
    <rect x="-25" y="-18" width="60" height="36" fill="#000"/>
    
    <!-- Flower Center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="7" fill="#FF0000"/>
    
    <!-- Petals -->
    <g transform="translate(0,-9)">
        <path d="M-10,0 Q-15,5 -10,10 T10,10 T15,5 L10,0 Z" 
              stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
